issues.issue: Ambiguous acceptableAnswers: both "Jam tiga pagi." and "Jam tiga malam." accepted. 03.00 falls in the transition between malam (18.30-03.00) and pagi (05.00-11.00), making either answer arguably wrong depending on the exact time. The transformation instruction says "'s ochtends om drie uur" but 03.00 is technically still malam.
issues.fix: Admin review: consider narrowing to one correct answer or adjusting the time to an unambiguous hour (e.g. 08.00 pagi).

issues.issue: DB patterns 'belum-vs-tidak' (lesson 1) and 'tidak-negation' (lesson 2) are not in confusion_group 'negation-types', while this lesson's bukan-negation and jangan-prohibition are. All four form one confusable set.
issues.fix: Consider a migration to update the confusion_group on the older DB patterns for coherent grouping.
